Q-merge-3: did any lineage surface a surface×delta this one missed? union then re-dedup vs round 1

Q-merge-5: does any sibling confirm the underscore/hyphen dead-pointer (AGENTS.md:217 skill-advisor-hook.md vs real skill_advisor_hook.md)? if so rec #4 gets a concrete already-broken first target

Q3 (SURFACE MAP): read-reliability matrix across OpenCode/Claude/Codex; thermostat proven firing this session; underscore/hyphen dead-pointer (iter 3)

Q5 (FOLLOW-UPS + GAPS): both carried follow-ups still-open; rec #12 one-comparison-away; gaps + 5 merge questions (iter 5)

rankedRecommendations.rec: Compact one-paragraph fable-5 governor on the live per-turn UserPromptSubmit hook
Mutation-check / claim-falsifier discipline into sk-code verification
Recursion-control constitutional rule (reason-about-problem-not-yourself; depth-limit-1; caption test) + xhigh briefs
Engineer staleness out of artifacts (counts->greps, lists->table-walking tests); first target the underscore/hyphen dead pointer + a pointer-resolution test
Inject governor into agent prompt templates / renderPromptPack (subagent surface the hook is blind to), via agent-mirror-sync
One-line doctrine-spine in AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md §1 (root conviction + register/voice + letter-vs-intent), paired with #1
leak_test-style behavioral metric (tool:text, words/msg, caveat%, self-opener%) as /doctor or deep:*-benchmark, runtime-aware bucketing
Scar-tissue + cold-successor handoff discipline into handover.md + _memory.continuity
Verification ladder with pre-named blind spots into sk-code/deep-review
Adversarial-review schema + machine-checkable evidence contract (= round-1 carried follow-up; dedicated packet)
Decision-economy + fail-closed-by-construction doctrine (named seam not TODO; never a dead control; reject not strip)
Fail-loud on model mismatch in executor-audit (audit already records the model; add the requested-vs-actual compare) (= round-1 codex SIGKILL/silent-gpt-5 carried follow-up; dedicated packet)

keyFindings.title: Mutation-as-epistemology (mutation check; claim-falsifier; compile-RED vs true-RED; hunt vacuous green)
Verification ladder with pre-named blind spots
Adversarial-review-at-scale + forced claim/verdict/evidence schema + completeness critic
Scar-tissue ledger (blast site + next-bite-site + load-bearing-vs-defensive + activation)
Cold-successor handoff protocol (carry only non-derivable; numbered Read order; ship next brief)
Engineer staleness out of artifacts (counts->greps, lists->table-walking tests)
Fail-closed by construction (structural not disciplinary invariants; reject not strip; code-disjoint verifier)
Decision economy: scope-frugal/process-expensive, named seam not bare TODO, never a dead control, scaffold-contract-not-implementation
Brief-sovereign letter-vs-intent dialectic; undocumented deviation is the sin
Two-register voice + signature lexicon + averted-disaster framing; no celebration/apology/flattery
Multi-agent house rules: LEAF disjoint-scope, git/.md ban, typed status enum, two-stage review, verify-personally backstop, orchestrator-commits
Reproduce-before-fix + second-break-behind-first + suspect-yourself-first + throwaway instruments
Measurement integrity (untrustworthy number is a bug even when green)
Ration live/destructive actions; harnesses over production; cleanup as privacy ethic
Worst-first triage in named severity buckets (downstream consequence to cold reader)
Opus recursion-control governor (8 rules; reason-about-problem-not-yourself; audit depth-limit 1; commit with // DECISION:; minimum-honest-qualifier; outcome-over-process; act-don't-narrate)
Three-layer persistence: setpoint(CLAUDE.md)->thermostat(UserPromptSubmit reinject)->measurement(leak_test); hook is SUBAGENT-BLIND, inject into agent briefs separately

leak_test.py harness: median words/msg, tool:text ratio, caveat%, self-opener% bucketed by model id from JSONL logs; verdict converging iff moved-toward AND closed-distance; INSUFFICIENT < 30 prose msgs
Prompt-vs-weights honesty: governor steers expression not weights; no capability gain; capability lever = task-structure (closed prompts) + multi-LLM orchestration
Quantified Fable signature: words 47->18, mean EQUAL (distribution not less), tool:text 1.41->3.91, result-first openers; cleanest tells = tool:text + opener
Extended-thinking caption test: captions about the problem (healthy) vs about yourself (burning budget on self-surveillance); name self-directed thought in <=3 words and return
Reject wrong framings/false dichotomies; lumpy-bit-not-armor-bit; outward turn (ask about their need)
Beautiful-dead-end guardrail + don't-overcorrect-into-curtness (govern the governor)
Anti-recursion self-check (one pass) + toggle (FABLE_MODE_OFF) + new-session activation; reinject payload = one ~90-word paragraph (feasibility proof for rec #1)
The live UserPromptSubmit hook fired on THIS session and carried a constitutional reminder (comment-hygiene HARD-BLOCK) — thermostat proven, not hypothetical
AGENTS.md:217 dead pointer is a hyphen/underscore naming drift (cites skill-advisor-hook.md; real file is skill_advisor_hook.md) — doc exists, fix is one-char-class edit + pointer-resolution test
12 agents x 3 byte/near-mirrored runtimes; agent-prompt edits must route through agent-mirror-sync.yml, not one mirror
Machine-checkable evidence contract STILL OPEN: zero grep hits for claim_class/would_confirm/gate_delta/scope_state/child_result_verified across deep-loop-runtime + spec-kit/references

codex model-mismatch STILL OPEN structurally: executor-audit.ts records the model (kind/model/reasoningEffort/serviceTier) and self-escalates SIGTERM->SIGKILL, but has no requested-vs-actual compare/fail-loud — rec #12 is one comparison away
